title: SG Cyber Act master CSA compliance dashboard + Commissioner attestation roll-up
evidence: Saved search `UC-22.57.15` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `csa_clause="CSA-master-rollup"`.

compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search, `CSA Master Scorecard` dashboard, monthly board pack.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Force any UC-22.57.x violation. UC-22.57.15 MUST reflect within 24h.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Resolve. UC-22.57.15 MUST roll up green.

spl:
search index=audit_evidence reg=SG-Cyber-Act earliest=-30d@d
| eval uc = case(
    match(_raw, "uc=22\.57\."), "22.57." + replace(_raw, ".*uc=22\.57\.(\d+).*", "\1"),
    1=1, "unknown")
| stats count as evidence_rows latest(_time) as last_evidence by uc
| eval hours_since_evidence = round((now() - last_evidence) / 3600, 1)
| eval health = case(
    hours_since_evidence > 48, "stale",
    evidence_rows = 0, "missing",
    1=1, "current")
| sort uc
| table uc evidence_rows last_evidence hours_since_evidence health
description: Roll-up panel showing UC-22.57.x compliance health.
implementation: (1) Schedule UC-22.57.15 daily. (2) Build `CSA Master Scorecard` dashboard.
visualization: (Panel 1) Per-UC health. (Panel 2) Trend. (Panel 3) Top outstanding. (Panel 4) Attestation history.
knownFalsePositives:
1. **UC cadence drift**: tune per UC.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `csa_22_57_15_exceptions`.
reviewer: CSA Compliance SME Panel + CC + CISO + Board
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

All UC-22.57.1 through UC-22.57.14 running.

## Step 1 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.57.15: CSA Master Roll-Up]
cron_schedule = 51 13 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.57.15,reg=SG-Cyber-Act,clause=CSA-master-rollup
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 2 — Runbook

Monthly CC review, quarterly Board update.

**SG-specific failure modes**:
- **Commissioner deep-dive**: each UC must stand alone for inspector review.
grandmaExplanation: All the smaller Singapore cyber checks roll into one dashboard so the boss can see at a glance what's healthy and what's not.
